title: Identify coordinates
description: Identify coordinates of points in the first quadrant.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is the *y*-coordinate of the point plotted below?** 



[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
The **ordered pair** of a point tells us how to get to it from the origin.

$\begin{array}{}
(\blueD{\text{distance right}},& \greenD{\text{distance up}})\\
\swarrow&\searrow\\
\blueD{x\text{-coordinate}}&\greenD{y\text{-coordinate}}
\end{array}$

We are asked to find the $\greenD{y\text{-coordinate}}$.

The $\greenD{y\text{-coordinate}}$ tells us the distance up from the origin.

[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ image 1]]

The point is $5$ units above the origin.
The $\greenD{y\text{-coordinate}}$ is $5$.

options.alt: A coordinate grid is labeled from 1 to 6 from the origin in both the x and y-axis. A blue point is 2 units to the right of and 5 units up from the origin.
